sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101337" key="susinapiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συσῐνᾱπιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n101337.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must plaster</tr_> head <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">as well</tr_> as chest <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with mustard</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.19</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συσσ-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
